changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities and align with the FedRAMP AU-3 (1) control. The naming mostly follows the conventions, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency. All functions are technically accurate and relevant to Kubernetes security features.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of past participle in descriptions for clarity, e.g., 'metadata_captured' instead of 'captures_metadata'.
title: Content of Audit Records | Additional Audit Information
step1_reasoning: The control AU-3 (1) focuses on ensuring that audit records include additional information for comprehensive logging. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and configured to capture detailed metadata. Additionally, retention policies should be configured to ensure logs are stored appropriately, and integrity protection mechanisms should be in place to prevent tampering.
